svg.text: CAPE & CAT Customer Engagement Framework · v1.0 · March 2026
Sample profile at Tier 3 (Grow) — avg. score 3.0 across all domains
Agents fully embedded. Multiple production deployments across departments. AI-first culture.
1–2 agents in production. Strong business case. Center of Excellence forming.
First pilot agent deployed or near deployment. Leadership support growing. ROI emerging.
Exploration stage. Use cases identified but not yet built. Exec buy-in needed.
No agents deployed. Awareness building phase. Executive briefing recommended.
